[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Blog revision: added Stone Soup folklore analogy to Plug-and-Play architecture post
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/51
  
  Details:
  Added Stone Soup folklore analogy to the Plug-and-Play Architecture blog post.
  
  ## What changed
  - Replaced the kitchen co-op analogy with the Stone Soup folk tale as the primary metaphor for the DAO's architecture
  - Opening: Stone Soup story where the traveler = Edgar, the stone = Google Sheet, the villagers = contributors and services, the soup = emergent ecosystem
  - Added technical translation paragraph mapping tale elements to actual system components
  - Closing: callback line — "it is not the stone that matters — it is what gathers around it"
  
  ## Why
  The Stone Soup analogy is more culturally resonant and better captures the emergent, collective quality of the architecture than a kitchen notebook. It also connects to the DAO's cooperative ethos.
  
  ## GitHub
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_me_beta/pull/51
